INJECT:mason = {
    pop_type = artisans
    unique_production_methods = {
        polished_stone = {
            stone = 0.2
            produced = luxury_masonry
            output = 0.25
            category = guild_input
        }
    }
}

REPLACE:bridge_infrastructure = {
    max_levels = 2
    pop_type = laborers
    category = infrastructure_category
    possible_production_methods = {
        bridge_maintenance
    }
}

TRY_REPLACE:missing_try_replace = {
    category = missing_category
}

TRY_INJECT:missing_try_inject = {
    category = missing_category
}

INJECT_OR_CREATE:created_by_inject = {
    max_levels = 1
    pop_type = peasants
    category = infrastructure_category
}

REPLACE_OR_CREATE:created_by_replace = {
    max_levels = 1
    pop_type = laborers
    category = basic_industry_category
}
